title: RAISE-Cut Root Cut Selection Reproducibility Package
description: Minimal public reproducibility package for the Plan 5 / RAISE-Cut root cut selection study. The repository supports analysis-level reproduction from archived merged results and archived summary tables, and also includes optional entry points for solver-side reruns when local SCIP and PySCIPOpt installations are available.

creators.name: Cao, Jin Xin
creators.affiliation: Inner Mongolia Academy of Science and Technology; Institute of Transportation Engineering, Inner Mongolia University
